title: Require Nx Workspace Scheduler Scripts
forbids: root-owned foundational Nx targets, noncanonical root schedulers, project-local lint owners, or any lint edge other than the one explicit habitat:lint dependency shared by every check
why: The workspace root schedules repository work but does not implement project quality. Exact single-command scripts keep Nx as the aggregate owner, and one explicit shared dependency schedules ordinary lint exactly once without project-local ownership or fan-out.
remediate: Remove root-owned foundational targets and project-local lint targets, restore the exact root build/check/lint/test/typecheck/CI schedulers, and make targetDefaults.check depend on exactly one explicit habitat:lint edge.
message: Nx workspace quality must retain one scheduler-only root and one shared Habitat lint edge.
